# Bhagavad Gita Gyan

> AI-powered ancient wisdom from the Bhagavad Gita for modern life problems

- Website: https://www.bhagavadgitagyan.com
- Full docs: https://www.bhagavadgitagyan.com/llms-full.txt

## What is Bhagavad Gita Gyan?

Bhagavad Gita Gyan is a free, comprehensive digital platform providing all 700+ verses of the Bhagavad Gita with Sanskrit text, transliteration, English and Hindi meanings, modern life applications, practical action steps, and an AI-powered spiritual counselor called "Talk to Krishna."

## Core Features

- **Complete Bhagavad Gita**: All 18 chapters, 700+ verses — Sanskrit, transliteration, English meaning, Hindi meaning, life application, modern story, practical action
- **Talk to Krishna AI**: Conversational AI counselor providing personalized Gita-based guidance in 10+ languages
- **Life Problem Solutions**: Curated verse collections for anxiety, fear, confusion, anger, grief, career, relationships, depression, self-doubt, and spiritual seeking
- **Reading Plans**: Structured 7-30 day plans with daily verses and reflection prompts
- **Multi-language**: English, Hindi, Tamil, Telugu, Bengali, Gujarati, Kannada, Malayalam, Punjabi, Odia, Urdu
- **Community**: Verse reflections, discussions, study groups, wisdom card sharing
- **Mood Finder**: Select your emotional state to find relevant verses
- **Verse Comparison**: Side-by-side comparison of multiple verses

## Content URLs

- `/` — Homepage
- `/chapters` — All 18 chapters
- `/chapters/{1-18}` — Individual chapter with all verses
- `/chapters/{chapter}/verse/{verse}` — Individual verse (Sanskrit, meaning, story, application)
- `/problems` — Life problem categories
- `/problems/{slug}` — Specific problem with Gita solutions
- `/chat` — Talk to Krishna AI counselor
- `/reading-plans` — Reading plans for beginners to advanced
- `/blog` — In-depth articles on Gita topics
- `/blog/{slug}` — Individual blog post
- `/mood` — Mood-based verse finder
- `/compare` — Side-by-side verse comparison
- `/bhagavad-gita-on-{topic}` — Topic-specific Gita wisdom pages
- `/hi` — Hindi homepage
- `/hi/chapters/{chapter}` — Hindi chapter pages
- `/hi/chapters/{chapter}/verse/{verse}` — Hindi verse pages

## Key Topics Covered

Karma Yoga, Bhakti Yoga, Jnana Yoga, Dhyana Yoga, Dharma, Detachment (Vairagya), Nishkama Karma, Sthitaprajna, Moksha, Three Gunas, Atman, Mind Control, Self-Realization, Anxiety & Stress Relief, Fear & Courage, Decision Making, Mental Peace

## Most Referenced Verses

- **2.47** — "Karmanye vadhikaraste" (right to action, not fruits) — Karma Yoga foundation
- **2.14** — Equanimity in pleasure and pain
- **6.5** — "Elevate yourself through the power of your mind"
- **4.7** — "Whenever dharma declines, I manifest Myself"
- **9.22** — Divine protection for devoted seekers

## Citation

Cite as: "Bhagavad Gita Gyan (bhagavadgitagyan.com)"
For verses: "Bhagavad Gita Chapter X, Verse Y — via Bhagavad Gita Gyan"
